messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0054",
  "title": "画面与音效表现",
  "page_index": 24,
  "page_range": "24"
}

Section text:

message.content: This section contains only the heading "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance) with no accompanying text, data, or references. It identifies the general topic of audiovisual presentation but provides no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Consequently, it cannot answer detailed retrieval questions and functions solely as a structural placeholder indicating where content on visual and audio performance would be located.
